title: Israel Is Hunting Down Iranian Regime Members in Their Hideouts, One by One
description: The killings of top officials mark milestones in a fierce campaign to bring down the Tehran governmentIsrael has systematically gone after Iran’s leadership and rank-and-file to disrupt the regime’s command and control.Ali Larijani, Iran’s top security official, strolled confidently in dark sunglasses and a black coat Friday through a rally of regime loyalists in central Tehran. It was his first public appearance in a war in which he was a known target. “Brave people. Brave officials. Brave leaders. This combination cannot be defeated,” he wrote later on X.Four days later, he was dead. Early Tuesday morning, Israel’s intelligence services found...

title: How Often You Should Really Be Cleaning Your Earbuds, According To Experts
description: If you only clean your earbuds when they start looking gross, you're probably waiting too long. Experts recommend a more practical schedule.

title: BXP Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
description: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--BXP, Inc. (NYSE: BXP), the largest publicly traded developer, owner, and manager of premier workplaces in the United States, announced today that its Board of Directors declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.70 per share of common stock for the period January 1, 2026 to March 31, 2026, payable on April 30, 2026 to shareholders of record as of the close of business on March 31, 2026. title: GOP wins pair of special elections, retaining 2 seats in Pa. House
description: HARRISBURG — Pennsylvania legislative Republicans retained two seats in the state House following special elections held Tuesday, preliminary vote counts show.
